storyHook: 进银行办业务，取号等候，办完离开

narrative.when: 周一上午十点，银行刚开门不久
narrative.who: 甲（储户）· 乙（银行柜员）
narrative.method: 说明业务、填单、核对身份、数钱、拿回单据
narrative.event: 甲要把工资存进账户，还要顺便办一张新卡

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning. The place is quiet today.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good morning. Yes, it is early. How can I help you?
turns.zh: 早上好。是啊，还早。您办什么业务？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like to put my money in my account.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Do you have your card with you?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, here it is. And I would like a new card as well.
turns.zh: 带了，给你。我还想办一张新卡。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. A new card for this account?
turns.zh: 好的。新卡也是这个账户吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, that is right. A second card for this account.
turns.zh: 对，同一个账户再办一张卡。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Take a seat. I will get the papers ready.
turns.zh: 好的。您先坐，我准备一下表格。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. I will keep an eye for my number.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need. You are after this one. Come when I say.
turns.zh: 不用等。您就是下一位。我叫您时过来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Table twenty three, please. This way.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That's me. Good morning.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning. How can I help?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is my money. I would like to put it in my account.
turns.zh: 这是我的工资。我想存进账户。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And you said a new card too. I have the form here.
turns.zh: 您还说要办张新卡。表格在这儿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Please put your name and number here.
turns.zh: 好的。请在这儿填上您的姓名和号码。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Is this line for the number?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. And put your name at the end.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. Here is the form.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me see the money first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Go on. It is all there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That number is right. Two thousand.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now for the new card, what name?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Same as the account. My name.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will make the card now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is your new card. Keep it safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. And the PIN? Do I get that now?
turns.zh: 谢谢。密码呢？现在能设吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Put your finger here.
turns.zh: 可以。请把手指放在这里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Like this? OK. What number do I put?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Any six numbers you keep in mind.
turns.zh: 任何六个你记得住的数字。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will use my birth month and day. 0 8 1 5.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now put your finger on the green key. Done.
turns.zh: 好。现在把手指放在绿色键上。好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was quick. Now I have the card and the money in the account.
turns.zh: 真快。现在卡和钱都到位了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Your balance is two thousand and thirty eight.
turns.zh: 是的。您的余额是两千零三十八。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. Thank you for your help. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 太好了。谢谢帮忙。祝您愉快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is your new card and the receipt for the money.
turns.zh: 这是您的新卡和存款回执。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me see the name and number. Yes, all good.
turns.zh: 我看看姓名和号码。嗯，没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep the card safe. Do not give your number to another person.
turns.zh: 保管好卡片。密码别告诉任何人。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it in my money bag now. Thanks for the word.
turns.zh: 我这就放钱袋里。多谢提醒。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all done. Anything more?
turns.zh: 都办妥了。还有其他需要吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. You have been a great help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Happy to help. Have a good week.
turns.zh: 乐意效劳。祝您一周顺利。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. I will come back if I need anything.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. We are open every day from nine to five.
turns.zh: 好的。我们每天九点到五点开门。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep that in mind. sure.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. be safe of your card.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. It is in my pocket now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Have a good day.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. You too.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What do I do now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take a picture of you and get your name. Please look here.
turns.zh: 我给您拍张照，再签个字。请看这里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Like this?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Put your name on this line.
turns.zh: 好的。请在这条线上签名。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here? Or there?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here, at the base. Use the pen, not your finger.
turns.zh: 这里，底部。用笔，别用手指。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will put the money in your account. Two thousand three hundred, yes?
turns.zh: 好的。我把钱存进您的账户。两千三百，对吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, that is the number. Please look at it again.
turns.zh: 对，就是这个数。麻烦再看一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: All good. Here is your new card and the paper. Keep them safe.
turns.zh: 全部没问题。这是您的新卡和回单。请收好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This card is good. Does it have a small bit inside?
turns.zh: 这张卡不错。里面有小芯片吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, all new cards have a small bit. Safer that way.
turns.zh: 有的，新卡都带一个小东西，更安全。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And I can use it at any machine?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Any machine that takes a card. No trouble at all.
turns.zh: 只要是能插卡的机器都行，没问题的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about the old account? Still open?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, still open. You have two accounts now.
turns.zh: 开着呢，您现在有两个账户了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will put some money in the new one by and by.
turns.zh: 那就好。回头我再往新卡里存点钱。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You may do that on the hand talker or at a machine.
turns.zh: 手机银行或机器上都能操作。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I have it on my hand box.
turns.zh: 好的，我手头的小盒子里已经有了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. That is all done. Anything more?
turns.zh: 好的，都办好了。还要别的吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. Thank you for your help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Here is your receipt and the new card.
turns.zh: 不客气。这是您的回单和新卡。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: May I put my name on the back of the card?
turns.zh: 要不要在卡背面签个名？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. Use a pen, not a sharp thing.
turns.zh: 好主意。用笔写，别用尖东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will do that now. Is the money all safe in the account?
turns.zh: 好，我这就写。钱都安全进账了吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the full amount is in. You may see it on your hand box.
turns.zh: 是的，全额到账。您可以在手机上查看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that after this. The new card works from now?
turns.zh: 回头查。新卡现在就能用吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: From this minute. The system is up and running.
turns.zh: 从此刻起就能用。系统已经上线了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will keep it safe. Have a good day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. be safe of your things.
turns.zh: 您也是。保管好随身物品。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the card in my money bag now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have the receipt for the new card?
turns.zh: 新卡的回执单您拿了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is here. And the paper for the money.
turns.zh: 拿了，在这儿。还有存款凭条。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Keep them together, you may need them.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it right to put my name on the back now or after?
turns.zh: 我现在在背面签名，还是等会儿？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now is best. Use the pen on the table.
turns.zh: 现在签最好。用桌上的笔。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will do it. Is this the right side?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the white line. Make it clear, please.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. I will put the card away now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: All done. Anything more?
turns.zh: 都办妥了。还需要什么吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for helping me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Have a good day.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. I will come again if I need anything.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. The door is on your right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. sure then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, sure. be safe of your card.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Thanks again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. okay after.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: okay. And keep that card safe.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put it in my pocket now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. The new card works from today.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I will use it for my money.
turns.zh: 那挺好。我以后工资就用它。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A good idea. The old one was a bit slow.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I hope the new one is quicker.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is. Have a great week.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. You too. Good day.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: okay. be safe.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. sure.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: See you. Take care.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. Good day.

storyBlurb: 周一的银行大厅里，甲攥着工资信封取号等候。窗口前，他存钱又办新卡，在乙的指引下填单、数钱，最后核对余额满意离开。
storyScript:
【开场·进门取号】周一上午十点，社区银行刚开门不久，营业厅里只有零星几位客户。甲推门而入，手里攥着刚发的工资信封。他径直走向取号机，按下“个人业务”键，取出号码条——A023。大厅里飘着淡淡的消毒水味，电子屏滚动着叫号信息。甲找了个空位坐下，目光扫过墙上的利率牌，心里盘算着存完钱再办张新卡的事。

【进行·办理业务】“请A023号到3号窗口。”甲起身走向柜台，乙微笑着示意他坐下。甲说明来意：存工资，再办一张储蓄卡。乙接过身份证和信封，先递来一张开户申请表。甲低头填信息，笔尖在纸上沙沙作响。乙则熟练地清点信封里的现金，手指翻飞间，一叠钞票被送入验钞机，哗啦啦的声响清脆利落。确认无误后，乙在键盘上敲击，屏幕上的数字跳动，存款金额录入系统。接着，她为新卡录入指纹、设置密码，整个过程一气呵成。

【进行·办理业务】乙将新卡和回执单递给甲，又打印出一张存款凭条。甲接过单据，目光在余额数字上停留片刻——工资到账，新卡在手，心里踏实了几分。他仔细核对姓名、卡号，确认无误后，将凭条折好放进钱包。乙提醒他保管好密码，甲点头应下，顺手把新卡插进卡槽。

【收束·确认离开】甲站起身，将单据和卡收好，朝乙道了声谢。走出银行时，阳光正好，他摸了摸口袋里的新卡，脚步轻快。周一上午的这件小事，让新的一周有了个安稳的开头。
